physical_source: Exported from RTK rover (CB_X / Trimble / Emlid / OTHER) per occupation
how_to_obtain: Each RTK check-point capture produces a record in the device export: per-point coordinate, fix_type at capture moment, receiver-estimated sigma (H/V precision), correction age at capture, fix hold duration, PDOP, satellite count, CN0, antenna info. CB_X exports full set; Trimble/Emlid exports subset depending on export config; OTHER variable.
notes: Per-point RTK device record. Replaces RINEX from PPK chains — RTK does not produce extended observation file for post-processing. Per-point sigma is the universal anchor indicator.

physical_source: Exported from capture app session (CB_X app, Trimble Access, Emlid Reach app)
how_to_obtain: Session-level log: download confirmation, signature/integrity verification, session boundaries. CB_X expected-present with signature; Trimble/Emlid expected-present without signature; OTHER expected-absent.
notes: Behaviour branches on device_type. CB_X is designed to produce signed logs for tamper-evidence; third-party gear typically does not.

physical_source: Entered by operator in CB capture app at upload, one record per occupation
how_to_obtain: Structured field form filled per occupation: device_type, antenna setup, baseline length, NTRIP mountpoint, expected mountpoint, target/mark info, accuracy target. Operator-declarative fields (mark_integrity_confirmed, tilt_compensation_used on non-tilt-comp gear, mark_photo_captured) are advisory only — zero scoring weight per Concern 5.
notes: Per-point operator metadata. Form design itself is the safeguard against antenna-height blunders. Tilt-compensation reads logged tilt verifiably on tilt-comp devices; falls back to advisory boolean on hand-held pole.
